name: Sweet Pea Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 bunch cilantro, washed, dried, and chopped
1 jalapeno pepper, washed, seeded, cored, and chopped
2 tablespoons fresh lemon or lime juice
1/2 teaspoon ground cumin or to taste
1/4 red onion, peeled, ends removed, finely diced
2 small tomatoes, cored, seeded, and finely diced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor blender, process the cilantro, garlic, and jalapeno until roughly pureed.
2. Add peas, olive oil, lemon juice, cumin, and salt to the blender.
3. Blend until smooth. Adjust seasoning as desired. There may be some lumps, but it adds to the textural interest.
4. Place in a serving bowl.
5. Sprinkle with onion and tomato or mix them into the pea mixture.
6. Use as you would any type of guacamole.
